text:
Levitation Stone (浮遊石) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|A stone about one carat in size that levitates. It can levitate one person, and receives energy from sunlight.

Summary

Levitation Stone 浮遊石 - This card allows the caster to summon forth a stone of levitation. This stone has the ability to levitate on its own. Anyone who holds it will also begin to levitate. This ability only works with a single person at a time, and the effects wear off once the user lets go of it. It receives energy from sunlight.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.080 :: 浮遊石 
その名の通り、宙に浮く石。１カラットほどの大きさの石で、人間１人浮かすことができる。太陽の光を当てないと浮力を得られない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.080 :: Levitation Stone 
As the name implies, a stone that floats on its own. The stone is about 1 karrot, and can float one person at a time. Buoyancy can't be maintained if not in the light of the sun.
|}
